arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund XI vs Lille – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund head to Lille this evening looking to secure their place in the Champions League quarter-finals. Last season’s runners-up have endured a tough campaign domestically but are in contention to reach the last eight in Europe. The first leg ended all square at the Westfalenstadion, as Lille youngster Hákon Arnar Haraldsson cancelled out Karim Adeyemi”s […] The post Borussia Dortmund XI vs Lille – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Tottenham initiate talks to sign Angel Gomes
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are eager to sign Lille midfielder Angel Gomes on a free transfer this summer and they have already initiated talks with his representatives, FootballTransfers understands. The 24-year-old is set to become a free agent when his current contract at Lille expires at the end of June and several Premier League clubs are interested in signing him on a Bosman deal, including Manchester United and West Ham United.
